sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_subtraction (value1 INT, value2 INT, result INT);
UPDATE test_subtraction SET result = value1 - value2 WHERE result IS NULL;
SELECT value1, value2, result FROM test_subtraction WHERE result = (value1 - value2);
INSERT INTO test_subtraction (value1, value2, result) VALUES (10, 7, 10 - 7);
